message:
feat(cli): add sync command for premium library offline access

Implements the `jfp sync` command for premium users to download their
saved prompts library to local cache for offline access and faster searching.

Features:
- `jfp sync` - Sync all saved prompts to ~/.config/jfp/library/
- `jfp sync --force` - Force full re-sync ignoring cache
- `jfp sync --status` - Show sync status and library info
- Incremental sync support (only downloads new prompts)
- JSON output for programmatic use

Implements: jeffreysprompts.com-hiff

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
